sections.subject: Physical Education

entries.title:
About This course includeds the following topic(s): Playground Games, Sports, Free Play/ Circuits, Historic Dancing

About Playground Games
Play group playground games.

About Sports
This year, students will learn how to play football, badminton, and softball through participating in a variety of games, skills, and activities. Activities are geared for smaller groups of students but can be adjusted to any size.

About Free Play/ Circuits
Make fitness-building routines a habit.

About Historic Dancing
Students will learn dances that were popular in the historical period being studied and perform them to some music of that period.

entries.content:
PE: Grades 7-12
Lessons specifically created for Grades 7-12. We do recommend you prioritize the Historical Dance lessons as these are less likely to be obtained elsewhere and also give depth and richness to student's understanding of the time period. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms, these lessons are optional.

entries.content:
Playground Games
Suitable for interested younger students.

Sports
Minimal supplies are required.

Free Play/ Circuits
Students may also choose to take a local Pilates or Yoga class.

Historic Dancing
This course is suitable for interested students in Grades 5-6 if combining.
